findings.agent_fix: add ops/ci/lib.sh defining shared helpers and tool version pins
findings.reason: ops/ci/lib.sh is the shared helper module (artifact assertions, tool pins) every lane sources

findings.agent_fix: add ops/git-hooks/pre-push that runs `bash ops/ci/quality-gates.sh` and wire it via `git config core.hooksPath ops/git-hooks`
findings.reason: without a mandatory pre-push gate, broken code can be pushed and CI is the first place a failure shows up

findings.agent_fix: add scripts/ci-doctor.sh listing every tool the ops/ci scripts depend on
findings.reason: without a doctor script, developers cannot confirm their local environment matches CI

findings.agent_fix: add scripts/ci-local.sh exposing each CI lane locally
findings.reason: scripts/ci-local.sh is the local entry point that delegates to the same ops/ci scripts the workflows call

findings.problem: workflow inlines CI commands instead of delegating to ops/ci/*.sh
findings.agent_fix: extract the workflow steps into ops/ci/<lane>.sh and call them with `bash ops/ci/<lane>.sh`
findings.reason: without a single source of truth, local runs drift from CI and breakage is only visible after push
